title: Sikko's Vanilla+
description: Enjoy the Vanilla+ experience provided by this pack!
body:
# About
This modpack has a little bit of everything and is mainly based on exploration. It is suitable for a Light, Vanilla+ experience and is suitable for newbies (well mostly) :).
# Credits
Special thanks to [devin](https://modrinth.com/user/devin) for his [Hammer](https://modrinth.com/modpack/hammer) modpack.
# Source
GitHub page is yet to be done and is WIP.
